creator: smh@FreeBSD.org
text:
The check in mysql-server rc script should not output a warning if the db directory version of my.cnf and the config directory version are the same file.

The following one line patch addresses the issue.

+ if [ -f "${mysql_dbdir}/my.cnf" ] && [ "${mysql_dbdir}/my.cnf" != `readlink ${mysql_confdir}/my.cnf` ]; then
- if [ -f "${mysql_dbdir}/my.cnf" ]

The message should also use the relevant variables.
